theme: one price list facing five customer tribes
title: One Price List, Five Tribes
strategies: pooled per-product revenue-curve pricing (ignores discrete-choice substitution and cohort participation -- the trap)
leximin water-filling: repeatedly raise the currently worst-off cohort's own product toward its defection threshold
coordinate ascent directly on the min-cohort-average-profit objective, multi-start (baseline + revenue-curve seed) with a coordinate-ascent polish pass
